forbidden_drift: removing alpha_public symbol without deprecation note
documenting a symbol that is not exported
exporting a new alpha_public symbol without manifest update
notes: This allowlist records exact Py/TS root API asymmetries at v0.0.2-alpha. It is not a claim that both SDKs are semantically identical.
